flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at New Orleans Baptist Theological Seminary fell 56% between 2021 and 2024 (49.1% → 21.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at New Orleans Baptist Theological Seminary rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.8k → $12.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at New Orleans Baptist Theological Seminary rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.8k → $12.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at New Orleans Baptist Theological Seminary rose 38% between 2021 and 2024 (66.7% → 92.0%).
